datasets.name: ds_distances
queryLines:
SELECT id, label, address, city, state, zip, lat, lon, anchor_label, anchor_lat, anchor_lon, miles, km
FROM main.default.address_distances
ORDER BY miles

lines:
# Address Distance
Anchor vs. comparison addresses. Native Lakeview map — server-rendered, air-gap safe.

Add a **Map** visualization with Latitude=`lat`, Longitude=`lon`, Color=`miles`, Tooltip=`label`, `city`, `miles`.
